commit_message:
EDA-1248 fix EDA-1248 fix Hi @thierryBesson This PR brings the fix for issue#1 for EDA-1248 which is related to missing output port "dly_b" in dsp_sim.v and cell_sim_blackbox.v in simulation models. Now after adding this we are only getting below warning in synthesis:

`
VERIFIC-WARNING [VERI-1927] /nfs_scratch/scratch/FV/ayyaz/Jira_Testcase/EDA-1248/add_shifted_a_to_mult_output/results_dir_0.5.15/.././rtl/add_shifted_a_to_mult_output.v:14: port 'dly_b' remains unconnected for this instance`

EDA-1248 fix EDA-1248 fix Hi @thierryBesson This PR brings the fix for issue#1 for EDA-1248 which is related to missing output port "dly_b" in dsp_sim.v and cell_sim_blackbox.v in simulation models. Now after adding this we are only getting below warning in synthesis:

examples.patch:

examples.commit_message:
EDA-1248 fix EDA-1248 fix Hi @thierryBesson This PR brings the fix for issue#1 for EDA-1248 which is related to missing output port "dly_b" in dsp_sim.v and cell_sim_blackbox.v in simulation models. Now after adding this we are only getting below warning in synthesis:

`
VERIFIC-WARNING [VERI-1927] /nfs_scratch/scratch/FV/ayyaz/Jira_Testcase/EDA-1248/add_shifted_a_to_mult_output/results_dir_0.5.15/.././rtl/add_shifted_a_to_mult_output.v:14: port 'dly_b' remains unconnected for this instance`
examples.patch:
@@ -98,6 +98,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT (
     input  wire [19:0] a,
     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,
+    output wire [17:0] dly_b,
 
     input  wire [2:0] feedback,
     input  wire       unsigned_a,
@@ -122,6 +123,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT (
         .a(a),
         .b(b),
         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .unsigned_a(unsigned_a),
         .unsigned_b(unsigned_b)
@@ -133,6 +135,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT_REGIN (
     input  wire [19:0] a,
     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,
+    output wire [17:0] dly_b,
 
     (* clkbuf_sink *)
     input  wire       clk,
@@ -161,6 +164,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT_REGIN (
         .a(a),
         .b(b),
         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .unsigned_a(unsigned_a),
         .unsigned_b(unsigned_b),
@@ -174,6 +178,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT_REGOUT (
     input  wire [19:0] a,
     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,
+    output wire [17:0] dly_b,
 
     (* clkbuf_sink *)
     input  wire       clk,
@@ -202,6 +207,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT_REGOUT (
         .a(a),
         .b(b),
         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .unsigned_a(unsigned_a),
         .unsigned_b(unsigned_b),
@@ -215,6 +221,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT_REGIN_REGOUT (
     input  wire [19:0] a,
     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,
+    output wire [17:0] dly_b,
 
     (* clkbuf_sink *)
     input  wire       clk,
@@ -243,6 +250,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULT_REGIN_REGOUT (
         .a(a),

         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .unsigned_a(unsigned_a),
         .unsigned_b(unsigned_b),
@@ -256,6 +264,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULTADD (
     input  wire [19:0] a,
     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,
+    output wire [17:0] dly_b,
 
     input  wire       clk,
     input  wire       lreset,
@@ -290,6 +299,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULTADD (
         .a(a),
         .b(b),
         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .acc_fir(acc_fir),
         .load_acc(load_acc),
@@ -310,6 +320,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULTADD_REGIN (

     input  wire        clk,

         .load_acc(load_acc),

+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .load_acc(load_acc),
 
@@ -582,6 +602,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULTACC_REGOUT (
     input  wire [19:0] a,
     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,
+    output wire [17:0] dly_b,
 
     (* clkbuf_sink *)
     input  wire        clk,
@@ -616,6 +637,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULTACC_REGOUT (
         .a(a),
         .b(b),
         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
         .feedback(feedback),
         .load_acc(load_acc),
 
@@ -638,6 +660,7 @@ module RS_DSP_MULTACC_REGIN_REGOUT (

     input  wire [17:0] b,
     output wire [37:0] z,

         .z(z),
+        .dly_b(dly_b),
 
         .feedback(feedback),
         .load_acc(load_acc),
@@ -996,4 +1020,4 @@ module dsp_t1_sim_cfg_ports # (
         else
             dly_b_o <= b_i;
 
-endmodule
\ No newline at end of file
+endmodule
